name: quantcoder
description: Use QuantCoder from Codex to turn quantitative research papers into QuantConnect LEAN algorithm drafts, lint them, and optionally validate/backtest through QuantConnect.

interface.shortDescription: Research-paper to QuantConnect workflow for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin wrapper around SL-Mar/quantcoder. It provides workflow guidance, slash-command equivalents, and MCP tools for QuantConnect documentation, local QC linting, validation, and backtesting. QuantCoder is experimental and should be used for research scaffolding with manual verification, not as a source of guaranteed trading performance.
defaultPrompt: Generate a QuantConnect draft from a summary.
Lint and validate this LEAN algorithm.
